task: 复现论文《ProtTrans: Toward Understanding the Language of Life Through Self-Supervised Learning》的核心发现
task_source: 【Title】ProtTrans: Toward Understanding the Language of Life Through Self-Supervised Learning

data.name: UniRef
data.description: UniRef数据库，包含蛋白质序列数据。
data._source: 【Abstract】Here, we trained two auto-regressive models (Transformer-XL, XLNet) and four auto-encoder models (BERT, Albert, Electra, T5) on data from UniRef and BFD containing up to 393 billion amino acids.

data.name: BFD (Big Fantastic Database)
data.description: BFD数据库，包含蛋白质序列数据。
data._source: 【Abstract】Here, we trained two auto-regressive models (Transformer-XL, XLNet) and four auto-encoder models (BERT, Albert, Electra, T5) on data from UniRef and BFD containing up to 393 billion amino acids.
